TX.weekend: No travel from 30 mins after sunset Friday to 30 mins before sunrise Monday for loads over 14' wide.
TX.holiday_rules: No travel from noon the day before the holiday until 30 mins before sunrise the day after.

metro_restrictions.Houston: No travel 6:00 AM - 9:00 AM and 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM on weekdays.
metro_restrictions.Dallas: No travel 6:30 AM - 9:00 AM and 4:00 PM - 6:30 PM on weekdays.

FL.weekend: No travel from 12:00 PM (noon) Saturday to 30 mins before sunrise Monday for all permitted loads.
FL.holiday_rules: No travel authorized on specified holidays. Travel resumes next business day at sunrise.

CA.weekend: Travel permitted on weekends unless restricted by specific route conditions (e.g., LA Basin).
CA.holiday_rules: No travel allowed from 6:00 AM on the holiday until 12:01 AM the following day.

metro_restrictions.Los Angeles Area: No travel 6:00 AM - 9:00 AM and 3:00 PM - 6:00 PM.
metro_restrictions.San Francisco Bay Area: No travel 6:30 AM - 8:30 AM and 3:30 PM - 6:30 PM.

WA.weekend: No travel allowed on weekends for loads exceeding 10' wide or 14'6" high.
WA.holiday_rules: No travel from noon the day before the holiday until noon the day after the holiday.

metro_restrictions.Seattle & King County: No travel 6:00 AM - 9:00 AM and 3:00 PM - 6:00 PM on I-5.

NY.weekend: No travel from noon Friday to sunrise Monday.
NY.holiday_rules: No movement allowed from 12:00 noon the day before a holiday until sunrise the day after.

metro_restrictions.New York City: All movement handled by NYC DOT with specific night-time routing. Day travel severely restricted.
